tests.hypothesis: LONG trades filtered when MSA_BEARISH improves win rate by >5pp
tests.test_description: Compare live MSA Bullish Regime Gate output against backtest proxy for SPY, QQQ, IWM, SMH, GLD, SLV over validation period.

per_ticker.signal_agreement_pct: Percentage of days where live and proxy produce the same signal
per_ticker.return_correlation: Correlation between live-signal returns and proxy-signal returns

aggregate.edge_preserved: Whether live signals preserve the backtest edge (Sharpe > 0)

notes: Type C rules require live infrastructure validation. Backtest proxy uses yfinance historical data. Tyler must run the same rules on live/intraday data and return results in the expected_outputs format.
